# Bitcoin Friesland

> Bitcoin Friesland (Frisian: Bitcoin Fryslân) is a volunteer community that
> promotes Bitcoin adoption and education in the province of Friesland, the
> Netherlands. The site is informational only and does not give financial advice.

## About
- Name: Bitcoin Friesland / Bitcoin Fryslân
- Region: Friesland (Fryslân), Netherlands
- Languages: Dutch (nl), English (en), Frisian (fy)
- Contact: info@bitcoinfriesland.com
- Community chat: https://t.me/bitcoinfriesland

## Main pages (Dutch)
- Home: https://bitcoinfriesland.com/nl/
- Meetups and events: https://bitcoinfriesland.com/nl/meetings.html
- Bitcoin map (where to pay with Bitcoin): https://bitcoinfriesland.com/nl/map.html
- For consumers (getting started): https://bitcoinfriesland.com/nl/consumers.html
- For business (accepting Bitcoin): https://bitcoinfriesland.com/nl/business.html
- Resources and links: https://bitcoinfriesland.com/nl/links.html
- About us: https://bitcoinfriesland.com/nl/about.html
- Treasure hunt: https://bitcoinfriesland.com/nl/treasure-hunt.html

## English pages
- Home: https://bitcoinfriesland.com/en/
- All English pages live under https://bitcoinfriesland.com/en/

## Frisian pages
- Home: https://bitcoinfriesland.com/fy/
- All Frisian pages live under https://bitcoinfriesland.com/fy/

## Notes
- Every page is available in Dutch, English and Frisian and is linked with hreflang.
- Bitcoin prices can be volatile. This site is educational and is not financial advice.
